org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster

接口 ClusterInvoker<T>

  • 类型参数:
    T -
    所有超级接口:
    Invoker<T>, Node
    所有已知子接口:
    MigrationClusterInvoker<T>
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractClusterInvoker, AvailableClusterInvoker, BroadcastCluster2Invoker, BroadcastClusterInvoker, FailbackClusterInvoker, FailfastClusterInvoker, FailoverClusterInvoker, FailsafeClusterInvoker, ForkingClusterInvoker, MergeableClusterInvoker, MigrationInvoker, MockClusterInvoker, ServiceDiscoveryMigrationInvoker, ZoneAwareClusterInvoker

    public interface ClusterInvoker<T>
extends Invoker<T>
    This is the final Invoker type referenced by the RPC proxy on Consumer side.

    A ClusterInvoker holds a group of normal invokers, stored in a Directory, mapping to one Registry. The ClusterInvoker implementation usually provides LB or HA policies, like FailoverClusterInvoker.

    In multi-registry subscription scenario, the final ClusterInvoker will refer to several sub ClusterInvokers, with each sub ClusterInvoker representing one Registry. Take ZoneAwareClusterInvoker as an example, it is specially customized for multi-registry use cases: first, pick up one ClusterInvoker, then do LB inside the chose ClusterInvoker.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Directory<T> getDirectory() 
      URL getRegistryUrl() 
      boolean isDestroyed() 

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.rpc.Invoker

        destroyAll, getInterface, invoke

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.common.Node

        destroy, getUrl, isAvailable
